content.problemStatement:
You are given two arrays of positive integers, AAA and BBB, both of length NNN. You must choose a sequence of NNN **non-increasing** real numbers R1,R2,‚Ä¶RNR_1, R_2, \ldots R_NR1‚Äč,R2‚Äč,‚Ä¶RN‚Äč to multiply with B1,B2,‚Ä¶BNB_1, B_2, \ldots B_NB1‚Äč,B2‚Äč,‚Ä¶BN‚Äč respectively, such that the sum of the squares of their differences with corresponding terms A1,A2,‚Ä¶ANA_1, A_2, \ldots A_NA1‚Äč,A2‚Äč,‚Ä¶AN‚Äč is minimized.

Formally, find the minimum possible value of ‚ąĎi=1N(Ai‚ąíRiBi)2\displaystyle \sum_{i=1}^{N} (A_i - R_i B_i)^2i=1‚ąĎN‚Äč(Ai‚Äč‚ąíRi‚ÄčBi‚Äč)2, over all possible NNN-tuples of real numbers R=(R1,R2,‚Ä¶RN)R = (R_1, R_2, \ldots R_N)R=(R1‚Äč,R2‚Äč,‚Ä¶RN‚Äč) satisfying R1‚Č•R2‚Č•‚čĮ‚Č•RNR_1 \ge R_2 \ge \cdots \ge R_NR1‚Äč‚Č•R2‚Äč‚Č•‚čĮ‚Č•RN‚Äč

###Input


The first line contains an integer TTT, the number of test cases. Then the test cases follow.
The first line of each test case contains an integer NNN, the length of arrays AAA and BBB.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers A1,A2,‚Ä¶ANA_1, A_2, \ldots A_NA1‚Äč,A2‚Äč,‚Ä¶AN‚Äč.
The third line contains NNN space-separated integers B1,B2,‚Ä¶BNB_1, B_2, \ldots B_NB1‚Äč,B2‚Äč,‚Ä¶BN‚Äč.
###Output
For each test case, print the minimum possible value of the objective as described in the statement.

Your answer is considered correct if its absolute or relative error does not exceed 10‚ąí610^{‚ąí6}10‚ąí6.

###Constraints


2‚Č§N‚Č§5‚čÖ1052\le N\le 5\cdot 10^52‚Č§N‚Č§5‚čÖ105
The sum of NNN over all test cases doesn't exceed 5‚čÖ1055 \cdot 10^55‚čÖ105
1‚Č§Ai,Bi‚Č§10001 \le A_i, B_i \le 10001‚Č§Ai‚Äč,Bi‚Äč‚Č§1000 for each valid iii.
###Subtasks


**Subtask 1 (5 points):** T=1,N=2T = 1, N = 2T=1,N=2.
**Subtask 2 (11 points):** The sum of NNN over all test cases doesn't exceed 202020.
**Subtask 3 (13 points):** The sum of NNN over all test cases doesn't exceed 300300300.
**Subtask 4 (14 points):** The sum of NNN over all test cases doesn't exceed 200020002000.
**Subtask 5 (20 points):** The sum of NNN over all test cases doesn't exceed 700070007000.
**Subtask 6 (37 points):** No additional constraints
###Sample Input

`3
2
2 5
1 8
5
7 9 1 4 3
9 8 6 13 1
10
66 23 51 81 60 7 26 127 66 8
9 88 77 12 2 38 7 63 90 111
`###Sample Output

`0.000000000000000
12.247238031469687
17698.696831405897683
`###Explanation
In the first test case, we choose R1=2R_1 = 2R1‚Äč=2 and R2=0.625R_2 = 0.625R2‚Äč=0.625
